creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
/stand/sysinstall in the described environment doesn't
	(obviously) report its version, and this can lead to issues
	if as in the example it's not at the correct level.

Fix: 

I'd suggest a pop-up with a copyright or whatever, or make
	it the continous top line of the screen.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Rebuild 2.1.5 from 2.2 system, once 'make reinstall'
	is built, go into /stand/sysinstall ...
